Windows 11 release information

Windows 11, version 26H1 is scoped to support new devices that come to market in early 2026 and is not designed as a feature update for existing devices. This version is not offered as an in-place update from 24H2 or 25H2 on existing devices.

Windows 11 current versions by servicing option

Version Servicing option Availability date End of updates: Home, Pro, Pro Education, and Pro for Workstations End of updates: Enterprise, Education, IoT Enterprise, and Enterprise multi-session Latest revision date Latest build
26H1 General Availability Channel 2026-02-10 2028-03-14 2029-03-13 2026-05-12 28000.2113
25H2 General Availability Channel 2025-09-30 2027-10-12 2028-10-10 2026-05-27 26200.8524
24H2 General Availability Channel 2024-10-01 2026-10-13 2027-10-12 2026-05-12 26100.8457
